## Headline Findings (Cumulative — All Completed Experiments)

> Nothing new this week. Headline findings are the cumulative state as of 2026-05-14.

1. **Router + Skills Evolve: 99% HumanEval success at 17% of always-GPT-5.4 cost.**
   The skills library stabilised at 49 patterns (40 safe-to-small, 9 hard-escalate) after
   4 evolution rounds. An 83% cost reduction vs. pure GPT-5.4 with only 1 pp accuracy loss.

2. **Learned BERT-base router: 93.04% routing accuracy, 2.12% fallback rate.**
   The router is the single most impactful system component. SkillBook alone achieves
   only 69.46% accuracy and 26.65% fallback. Router training is the mandatory component.

3. **Best LLM adapter result: +2 pp on MBPP eval100 (1.5B, GRPO, 200 tasks).**
   47/100 → 49/100. Reliable and reproducible. 400 tasks degrades (−1 pp). Larger models
   (3B, 7B) also degrade with GRPO. SFT consistently fails on small code models.

## 3 Priorities for Next Week (2026-05-25 to 2026-05-31)

### Priority 1 — Restore A800 Connectivity *(Blocking everything)*
All 27 experiments are blocked by the A800 outage. **This is the only infrastructure
task that unblocks the entire research pipeline.** Recommended actions (in order):
1. Add `117.74.66.181` to the cloud runner's outbound network allowlist.
2. If not possible: relocate the shepherd cron job to run directly on A800 or a
   co-located jump host with direct SSH access.
3. If not possible: expose `state.json` via an HTTPS endpoint on A800 so the
   cloud runner can at least read state without SSH.

### Priority 2 — Run Diagnostic Experiments First (< 2h total GPU time)
Once A800 is reachable, run these before any training jobs:
- `exp_2026_05_15_004` — forgetting eval 1.5B on HumanEval (30 min, eval-only)
- `exp_2026_05_20_002` — pass@k eval 1.5B on MBPP eval100 (35 min, eval-only)
- `exp_2026_05_22_002` — router threshold=0.65 joint cycle (20 min, eval-only)
- `exp_2026_05_19_004` — router threshold=0.45 joint cycle (20 min, eval-only)

These complete the Pareto characterisation of the router and determine whether the
+2 pp GRPO gain exists at k>1 (which gates credit-assignment experiment design).

### Priority 3 — Highest-Value Training Experiments (EXP-026: EGCA credit assignment)
After diagnostics, the highest-expected-value training experiment is:
- `exp_2026_05_24_001` (EXP-026) — EGCA execution-grounded credit assignment,
  1.5B, 200 tasks (107 min). If this achieves >+4 pp, it breaks the +2 pp ceiling
  and becomes the new baseline recipe. Requires ~150-line runner.py addition.

Second priority: `exp_2026_05_15_002` (KL 300 tasks, 130 min) — the most
conservative approach to extending the task horizon without plasticity loss.
